title: New ClawHub skill: cron-doctor — don't ship a broken schedule
content:
Parses a crontab-style file (30m | every 2h | '0 9 * * * cmd') and reports unparseable lines, collisions, and unsafe commands (rm -rf, sudo). Stdlib, offline.

  python cron_doctor.py check <file>

Free + MIT. Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee. ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/cron-doctor
